user.title: Lidl Plus Setup
user.description: Run `./lidl-auth.sh --debug` on your Mac. Copy only the long hex line (not the dashed separator lines). Country and language here must match the CLI (default in script: DE + de).

reauth_confirm.title: Lidl Plus – Re-authentication required
reauth_confirm.description: Paste the refresh token hex line only. Or run `./lidl-ha-sync.sh` from your Mac to push automatically. If paste keeps failing, use Developer tools → Services → lidl_plus.set_refresh_token.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid or expired token. Paste only the token line (no spaces/newlines). Match Country/Language to your auth (e.g. DE + de). Try the set_refresh_token service if the UI keeps rejecting a good token.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Lidl Plus servers.

activate_all_coupons.name: Activate all coupons
activate_all_coupons.description: Activates all available Lidl Plus coupons immediately.

set_refresh_token.name: Set Refresh Token
set_refresh_token.description: Validates with Lidl, stores rotated token, reloads integration. Use when reauth UI rejects a fresh token.
